title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at EazyDiner - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at EazyDiner - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at EazyDiner are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About EazyDiner:
EazyDiner is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner!
